game.avoid_if: Evite se voce nao quer lidar com speedrun, Crushing ou cleanup de coletaveis em dois jogos.
game.before_you_start: Entenda que a colecao tem uma platina compartilhada e exige trofeus dos dois jogos.
game.best_for: Ideal para quem quer uma platina narrativa de acao-aventura com dois jogos completos e bastante checklist.
game.cleanup_advice: Use chapter select para limpar coletaveis, conversas, trofeus especificos e preparar speedrun/Crushing.
game.difficulty_reason: A dificuldade vem principalmente de Crushing, speedrun e trofeus especificos, alem do volume de dois jogos.
game.dlc_scope: The Lost Legacy aparece como grupo separado na lista, mas faz parte do caminho para a platina compartilhada da colecao.
game.first_run_advice: Curta as campanhas, mas use checklist de coletaveis se quiser reduzir chapter select depois.
game.grind_summary: O peso esta em coletaveis, chapter select, trofeus especificos, Crushing e speedrun, nao em grind repetitivo.
game.missable: Nao ha trofeus online nem multiplayer obrigatorio. A colecao permite chapter select/encounter select para cleanup, entao os objetivos sensiveis nao sao perdiveis definitivos, mas Crushing, speedrun, coletaveis, conversas, fotos, lockboxes e acoes especificas pedem planejamento. A platina e compartilhada entre Uncharted 4: A Thief's End e Uncharted: The Lost Legacy.
game.missable_summary: Sem perda definitiva por causa de chapter select, mas trate speedrun, 70% de precisao, Crushing, coletaveis e objetivos situacionais como pontos de atencao.
game.name: Uncharted: Legacy of Thieves Collection
game.online_summary: Nao ha exigencia online na colecao; os trofeus multiplayer antigos nao fazem parte da lista Legacy of Thieves.
game.runs_summary: A platina cobre Uncharted 4 e The Lost Legacy. Planeje campanha, chapter select, Crushing, speedrun e cleanup dos dois jogos.
game.time_reason: A faixa de 30-40 horas considera Uncharted 4, The Lost Legacy, coletaveis, chapter select, Crushing, speedrun e cleanup.
game.verification_note: Lista da Legacy of Thieves Collection cadastrada com base em fontes publicas; aguarda revisao editorial manual final.

roadmaps.content: {"title":"Complete coletáveis antes do endgame","focus":"","objective":"Jogue Uncharted 4: A Thief's End naturalmente, coletando tesouros, journal entries, journal notes e conversas opcionais quando possivel.","actions":[],"warning":"","result":""}

{"title":"Limpe coletáveis por seleção de capítulos","focus":"","objective":"Limpe Uncharted 4 por chapter select/encounter select, incluindo tesouros, journal entries, optional conversations, armas e trofeus situacionais de capitulos especificos.","actions":[],"warning":"","result":""}

{"title":"Prossiga pela rota planejada","focus":"","objective":"Complete Uncharted 4 em Crushing e prepare a speedrun de ate 6 horas conforme a estrategia escolhida, lembrando que cheats liberados depois da campanha ajudam e nao removem trofeus.","actions":[],"warning":"","result":""}

{"title":"Fechamento e revisão final","focus":"","objective":"Jogue Uncharted: The Lost Legacy como parte obrigatoria da platina compartilhada, coletando tesouros, fotos, lockboxes, Hoysala tokens e conversas.","actions":[],"warning":"","result":""}

{"title":"Limpe coletáveis por seleção de capítulos","focus":"","objective":"Limpe The Lost Legacy por chapter select, fechando coletaveis, stealth, combate, veiculo, puzzles e trofeus especificos de capitulos.","actions":[],"warning":"","result":""}

{"title":"Fechamento e revisão final","focus":"","objective":"Revise ambos os jogos, confirme que os 49 trofeus de The Lost Legacy foram obtidos, conclua Don't Ruin The Moment e desbloqueie a platina compartilhada.","actions":[],"warning":"","result":""}

seedExtras.note: Campos exportados para auditoria. O SQLite atual nao possui colunas nativas para todos esses extras; a importacao preserva o que o banco suporta.

trophies.description: Collect all the Trophies
trophies.name: A Thief's Legacy
trophies.tip: [Colecao] Platina compartilhada: exige todos os trofeus de Uncharted 4 e tambem os 49 trofeus de The Lost Legacy.

trophies.description: Complete the game in explorer mode
trophies.name: Charted! - Explorer
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Terminar em dificuldade superior tambem libera as dificuldades inferiores.

trophies.description: Complete the game in light mode
trophies.name: Charted! - Light
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Pode acumular com Hard ou Crushing.

trophies.description: Complete the game in moderate mode
trophies.name: Charted! - Moderate
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Pode acumular com dificuldades mais altas.

trophies.description: Complete the game in hard mode
trophies.name: Charted! - Hard
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Crushing tambem libera este trofeu.

trophies.description: Complete the game in crushing mode
trophies.name: Charted! - Crushing
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Planeje a run de Crushing; cheats liberados apos finalizar a campanha podem reduzir bastante o risco.

trophies.description: Complete the game in 6 hours or less
trophies.name: Charted! - Speedrun
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Trofeu de planejamento: pule cutscenes, use Explorer, auto-aim e cheats quando disponiveis.

trophies.description: Find a Treasure
trophies.name: First Treasure
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Primeiro marco de tesouros; todo progresso fica disponivel para cleanup.

trophies.description: Find 50 treasures
trophies.name: Treasure Hunter
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Use chapter select para fechar tesouros esquecidos.

trophies.description: Find all Treasures
trophies.name: Treasure Master
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Exige todos os tesouros; trate como checklist principal de coletaveis.

trophies.description: Find the Strange Relics
trophies.name: Relic Finder
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Os Strange Relics contam como tesouros e ficam em capitulos especificos.

trophies.description: Find a Journal Entry
trophies.name: Jot This Down
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Primeiro journal entry; pode ser limpo por chapter select.

trophies.description: Find all Journal Entries
trophies.name: Lost Art of Journaling
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Revise os contadores por capitulo para completar todos os journal entries.

trophies.description: Find a Journal Note
trophies.name: Take a Note
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Primeiro journal note; progresso salvo para cleanup.

trophies.description: Find All Journal Notes
trophies.name: Lost History
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Feche os journal notes pelo contador de chapter select.

trophies.description: Defeat 20 enemies with headshots
trophies.name: Head of the Class!
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Deve vir naturalmente; encounter select ajuda a completar.

trophies.description: Defeat 50 enemies with headshots
trophies.name: You Have a Head for this Business
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Continue priorizando headshots em encontros ou farmando por checkpoint.

trophies.description: Perform 20 headshots from the rope
trophies.name: Hangman's Bullet
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Bom para farmar em encounter select com checkpoint restart.

trophies.description: Stealth take-down 5 enemies
trophies.name: Stealth First Ask Questions Later
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Objetivo simples de stealth; pode vir naturalmente.

trophies.description: Stealth take-down 30 enemies
trophies.name: Shh Sleep Now
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Farmavel em encounter select se nao vier durante a campanha.

trophies.description: Perform 30 vertical stealth takedowns
trophies.name: I Thought I Heard Something
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Use encontros com inimigos abaixo de saliencias e reinicie checkpoint.

trophies.description: Defeat 50 enemies from-the-hip or blind-firing
trophies.name: Run-and-Gunner
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Nao mire com L2; use hip-fire ou blind-fire.

trophies.description: Defeat 10 enemies in a row, alternating gunplay and hand-to-hand
trophies.name: Leapfrog
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Alterne uma eliminacao por arma e uma por melee ate completar a sequencia.

trophies.description: Defeat 100 enemies in a row without dying in combat
trophies.name: Unstoppable!
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Pode vir na speedrun; se faltar, use encontros com respawn ou checkpoint seguro.

trophies.description: Complete game with 70% or higher shot accuracy
trophies.name: Sharpshooter
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Trofeu de atencao: auto-aim, armas precisas e uma run limpa ajudam a manter 70%.

trophies.description: Defeat enemies with a pistol, machine gun, and grenade, in that order, in 15 seconds
trophies.name: Rushing Roulette
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Faca exatamente a ordem pistol, machine gun e grenade em um encontro com inimigos proximos.

trophies.description: Get through Scotland cemetery combat encounter without killing or being seen
trophies.name: Ghost in the Cemetery
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Objetivo de stealth do capitulo 8; reinicie checkpoint se for visto.

trophies.description: Make 10 enemies drop their grenades
trophies.name: Butterfingers
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Jogue em Crushing para aumentar granadas e atire no inimigo enquanto ele prepara o arremesso.

trophies.description: Defeat 4 enemies with the same explosion (all explosive items and weapons apply)
trophies.name: Boom County
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Use encounter select e mire em grupos compactos com explosivos.

trophies.description: Defeat 10 enemies in 60 seconds with the China Lake Grenade Launcher
trophies.name: Defeat 10 in 60 - China Lake GL
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Fica bem mais simples com weapon select e infinite ammo apos terminar a campanha.

trophies.description: Destroy 10 vehicles while being dragged from the rope
trophies.name: Hang Tough!
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Repita o inicio do encontro de comboio ate somar os veiculos.

trophies.description: Defeat enemies with a stealth attack, melee attack, headshot, and explosives, in that order, in 15 seconds
trophies.name: Run the Table
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Sequencia estrita e rapida: stealth, melee, headshot e explosivo.

trophies.description: Defeat 5 armored enemies with melee only
trophies.name: Hitting a Brick Wall
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Remova o capacete com salto/melee e finalize sem usar tiros.

trophies.description: After being marooned, leave everyone alive until the Treasury
trophies.name: Peaceful Resolution
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Trofeu sensivel dos capitulos 13 e 14: avance sem matar e reinicie se algo sair errado.

trophies.description: Perform 10 combo buddy takedowns
trophies.name: Wingman
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Use lutas com aliado e ataque o mesmo inimigo que ele estiver golpeando.

trophies.description: Pull 20 enemies over when hanging from a ledge
trophies.name: Cliffhanger
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Pode ser farmado por checkpoint em encounter select.

trophies.description: Defeat 1000 enemies
trophies.name: Ludonarrative Dissonance
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Soma campanha e encounter select; deve vir durante runs e cleanup de combate.

trophies.description: Play with the lemur in the market and let it steal your apple
trophies.name: Don't Feed the Animals
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Acao especifica do mercado no capitulo 11.

trophies.description: Use every gun
trophies.name: I Accidentally All the Guns
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Inclui armas de bonus e armas encontradas em encontros; acompanhe como checklist separado.

trophies.description: Knock over all rock cairns in Madagascar
trophies.name: Not a Cairn in the World
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Todos os cairns ficam em Madagascar no capitulo 10.

trophies.description: Climb to the very top of the Clocktower in the City
trophies.name: I Can See My House From Here!
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Acao especifica do capitulo 11 antes de sair da torre.

trophies.description: Solve the first Trial in Scotland in 10 moves or less
trophies.name: Trials and Tribulations
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Reinicie checkpoint quando entender a solucao do puzzle.

trophies.description: Beat the best score in the retro videogame
trophies.name: Best Score!
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Feito no epilogo; pegue frutas, vida extra e termine rapido.

trophies.description: Listen to all optional conversations in game
trophies.name: Gift of Gab
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Use checklist de conversas opcionais e confira contadores por capitulo.

trophies.description: Play in the ocean near the sunken ship
trophies.name: Marco Polo Returns!
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Acao especifica do capitulo 12.

trophies.description: Just prior to City Chase, stand perfectly still for 30 seconds (stage demo fail)
trophies.name: Stage Fright
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Pare por 30 segundos no ponto certo antes da perseguição da cidade.

trophies.description: Drive away in the jeep with Elena without killing any enemies
trophies.name: Just Floor It!
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Use stealth e dificuldade baixa para entrar no jeep sem mortes.

trophies.description: Get three dolphins to follow the boat
trophies.name: On Porpoise
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Acao especifica do capitulo 12 com o barco.

trophies.description: Hit all targets in the attic with the toy gun
trophies.name: Still Got It!
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Acao especifica do capitulo 4.

trophies.description: Take a photo of Sully
trophies.name: Glamour Shot
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] No capitulo 11, fotografe Sully em vez do objetivo principal.

trophies.description: Perfectly parry Rafe in the sword fight without getting slashed or stabbed
trophies.name: Swordmaster
trophies.tip: [Uncharted 4] Trofeu do duelo final; use encounter select, Explorer e slow motion se precisar.

trophies.description: Collect all the trophies in Uncharted™: The Lost Legacy
trophies.name: Don't Ruin The Moment
trophies.tip: [Colecao] Este ouro deixa claro que The Lost Legacy e obrigatorio para a platina compartilhada.

trophies.description: Complete the Game
trophies.name: Legacy Found!
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Complete a campanha em qualquer dificuldade.

trophies.description: Complete the Game in Crushing mode
trophies.name: Progress Demands Sacrifice
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Crushing tambem faz parte do caminho obrigatorio da colecao.

trophies.description: Find 5 treasures
trophies.name: Casual Treasure Hunter
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Primeiro marco de tesouros.

trophies.description: Find 35 treasures
trophies.name: Hardcore Treasure Hunter
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Continue acompanhando tesouros por capitulo.

trophies.description: Find all the treasures
trophies.name: Collector of Antiquities
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Checklist completo de tesouros; chapter select permite limpeza.

trophies.description: Ask Skeleseer a question
trophies.name: Shake For Your Fortune
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Trofeu situacional ligado a um easter egg.

trophies.description: Find a Hoysala token
trophies.name: Token For Granted
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Primeiro Hoysala token.

trophies.description: Find all the Hoysala tokens and obtain the Queen's Ruby
trophies.name: Yas Queen
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Complete a rota dos Hoysala tokens e pegue a Queen's Ruby.

trophies.description: Open 5 lockboxes
trophies.name: Five Finger Discount
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Primeiro marco de lockboxes.

trophies.description: Open every lockbox
trophies.name: Picks or It Didn't Happen
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Abra todas as lockboxes; use chapter select para limpar.

trophies.description: Take a photo at 5 photo opportunities
trophies.name: #nofilter
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Primeiro marco de fotos opcionais.

trophies.description: Take a photo at all the photo opportunities
trophies.name: Pics or It Didn't Happen
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Complete todas as oportunidades de foto.

trophies.description: Listen to all optional conversations
trophies.name: Getting to Know You
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Acompanhe conversas opcionais junto dos coletaveis.

trophies.description: Use every gun in the game
trophies.name: Si Vis Pacem Para Bellum
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Use checklist de armas durante campanha e encounter select.

trophies.description: Defeat an enemy with the last bullet in your handgun clip
trophies.name: Were You Counting?
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Prepare um inimigo fraco e finalize com o ultimo tiro do pente.

trophies.description: Defeat 10 enemies with headshots in a row
trophies.name: 10 Up, 10 Down
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Use dificuldade baixa e mira cuidadosa para manter a sequencia.

trophies.description: Defeat 5 consecutive enemies with the silenced pistol without being detected
trophies.name: Frazer. Chloe Frazer.
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Faca a sequencia em stealth com a pistola silenciada.

trophies.description: Defeat 20 enemies firing from-the-hip
trophies.name: Itchy Trigger Finger
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Farmavel em encounter select sem mirar.

trophies.description: Defeat 20 enemies blind-firing from cover
trophies.name: Stay and Pray
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Use cover e atire sem mirar.

trophies.description: Stealth take-down 10 armored enemies with melee by first removing their helmets without being detected
trophies.name: Tip of the Hat
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Exige stealth em inimigos blindados; remova capacetes antes do takedown.

trophies.description: Defeat 20 enemies with C4
trophies.name: Royal Demolitionist
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Acumule abates com C4 em encounters.

trophies.description: Mark 30 enemies
trophies.name: On the Grid
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Marque inimigos antes de iniciar combate sempre que possivel.

trophies.description: Open a lockbox with enemies nearby
trophies.name: I Was Never Here
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Abra uma lockbox sem limpar totalmente a area.

trophies.description: Defeat 4 enemies with one C4 detonation
trophies.name: C-Phoria
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Agrupe inimigos e detone C4 em um encontro favoravel.

trophies.description: Stealth take-down 15 enemies in a row
trophies.name: Just the Wind
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Mantenha stealth e reinicie se quebrar a sequencia.

trophies.description: Break stealth and re-enter stealth successfully
trophies.name: Now You See Me...
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Seja visto, escape e volte ao estado de stealth.

trophies.description: Perform 10 combo partner takedowns
trophies.name: Wingwoman
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Ataque inimigos junto da parceira para contar combos.

trophies.description: Make it to the outskirts of Halebidu in Chapter 5 without using a firearm or explosive
trophies.name: The Way of the Warrior
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Trofeu de atencao: ate chegar ao ponto exigido do capitulo 5, use apenas stealth/melee.

trophies.description: Defeat 5 enemies, each one taking damage from a handgun, long-gun, and melee
trophies.name: The Sampler
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Cada inimigo precisa receber os tres tipos de dano.

trophies.description: Defeat enemies with the vehicle, long-gun, melee, and grenade, in that order, in 20 seconds
trophies.name: Make an Entrance
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Sequencia rapida e em ordem: veiculo, long-gun, melee e grenade.

trophies.description: Defeat 30 enemies with gold weapons
trophies.name: Bring in the Big Guns
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Use armas douradas quando encontra-las ou via encounter select.

trophies.description: Defeat 4 enemies with the vehicle in 20 seconds
trophies.name: 4x4x4
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Use area aberta com inimigos proximos e atropelamentos rapidos.

trophies.description: Use all the zip-lines to traverse the city
trophies.name: Drop Me a Line
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Checklist de zip-lines da cidade.

trophies.description: Appreciate the view at the top of the Hoysala Empire
trophies.name: Your Prize
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Trofeu situacional de exploracao no topo da area.

trophies.description: Drive from the Ganesh mountain carving to the top of the waterfall at the Trident Fort and back in under 3 minutes
trophies.name: Best Driver in the Business
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Treine a rota de veiculo antes de tentar o tempo.

trophies.description: Get through all 3 Axe Fort trials without resetting any boards
trophies.name: Flawless Gauntlet
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Resolva os tres trials sem resetar tabuleiros.

trophies.description: After entering the Trident Fort, reach the door without being seen
trophies.name: Quiet as a Mouse
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Stealth especifico do Trident Fort; reinicie se for detectado.

trophies.description: Perform 5 grapple swings in a row without touching the ground
trophies.name: Tarzana
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Encontre uma sequencia de grapple points e nao toque o chao.

trophies.description: Get 30 seconds of total airtime with the vehicle
trophies.name: Stunt It!
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Acumule saltos com o veiculo durante exploracao.

trophies.description: Complete the shadow puzzle in 10 moves or less
trophies.name: Shadow Theater
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Reinicie checkpoint quando souber a solucao do puzzle.

trophies.description: Play in the water in the dam in Halebidu
trophies.name: Marco Po-No
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Acao especifica de agua na barragem.

trophies.description: Pick a three pin lock in under 15 seconds
trophies.name: Fingersmith
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Escolha uma lockbox simples e pratique o timing.

trophies.description: Plant multiple C4 charges on the APC at the same time and destroy it with one massive detonation
trophies.name: Overkill
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Trofeu especifico de APC com multiplas cargas de C4.

trophies.description: Perform an impressive dive from the cliff near the old railroad tracks
trophies.name: Cannonball!
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Salto especifico perto dos trilhos antigos.

trophies.description: Destroy the helicopter without defeating any other enemies
trophies.name: Right Under Your Nose
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Trofeu de encontro avancado: foque no helicoptero e evite matar inimigos extras.

trophies.description: Ram 10 motorcycles
trophies.name: Combat Racing
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Atropele motos em secoes de veiculo/combate.

trophies.description: Commandeer 6 vehicles by jumping on them and kicking out the driver
trophies.name: Backseat Driver
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Pule em veiculos inimigos e expulse os motoristas.

trophies.description: Destroy a vehicle in Chapter 9 with an explosive
trophies.name: Here, Catch!
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Acao especifica do capitulo 9 com explosivo.

trophies.description: Drive over the edge in the Western Ghats
trophies.name: Let's Not Get Caught
trophies.tip: [The Lost Legacy] Trofeu situacional de exploracao com o veiculo.
